import {GoblEntity} from 'gobl-utils-ts';


export default abstract class CurrencyBase extends GoblEntity {
	public static readonly PREFIX = 'ccy';
	public static readonly COLUMNS = [
		'ccy_code',
		'ccy_name',
		'ccy_symbol',
		'ccy_data',
		'ccy_created_at',
		'ccy_updated_at',
		'ccy_valid',
	] as const;
	public static readonly COL_CODE = 'ccy_code';
	public static readonly COL_NAME = 'ccy_name';
	public static readonly COL_SYMBOL = 'ccy_symbol';
	public static readonly COL_DATA = 'ccy_data';
	public static readonly COL_CREATED_AT = 'ccy_created_at';
	public static readonly COL_UPDATED_AT = 'ccy_updated_at';
	public static readonly COL_VALID = 'ccy_valid';


	public singlePKValue():string {
		const id = this.code;
		if (id === undefined || id === null) {
			throw new Error('Cannot get single PK value for unsaved "Currency".');
		}
		return String(id);
	}


	public identifierColumns(): string[] {
		return [CurrencyBase.COL_CODE];
	}


	get code(): string { return this._data[CurrencyBase.COL_CODE]; }
	set code(v: string) { this._set(CurrencyBase.COL_CODE, v); }

	get name(): string { return this._data[CurrencyBase.COL_NAME]; }
	set name(v: string) { this._set(CurrencyBase.COL_NAME, v); }

	get symbol(): string { return this._data[CurrencyBase.COL_SYMBOL]; }
	set symbol(v: string) { this._set(CurrencyBase.COL_SYMBOL, v); }

	get data(): Record<string, unknown> { return this._data[CurrencyBase.COL_DATA]; }
	set data(v: Record<string, unknown>) { this._set(CurrencyBase.COL_DATA, v); }

	get created_at(): string { return this._data[CurrencyBase.COL_CREATED_AT]; }
	set created_at(v: string|number) { this._set(CurrencyBase.COL_CREATED_AT, v); }

	get updated_at(): string { return this._data[CurrencyBase.COL_UPDATED_AT]; }
	set updated_at(v: string|number) { this._set(CurrencyBase.COL_UPDATED_AT, v); }

	get valid(): boolean { return this._data[CurrencyBase.COL_VALID]; }
	set valid(v: boolean) { this._set(CurrencyBase.COL_VALID, v); }

}
